addTopBarIcon: Add a top bar icon by plugin
confirmRemove: Confirm to delete the data in ${name}?
getTab: Print out all opened custom tabs in the debugger

hello.makesure: Before using this template, please read the offical sample, make sure that you've known about the pipeline for plugin developing.

puppy_visible_desc: Show or hide the mascot on screen.
desc_list_notebooks: List all notebooks in the workspace
desc_create_document: Create a new document with markdown content at a human-readable target path
desc_move_documents: Move multiple documents to a new location
desc_get_document_path: Get file path by document ID
desc_get_hpath_by_path: Get hierarchical path by file path
desc_get_hpath_by_id: Get hierarchical path by document ID
desc_get_ids_by_hpath: Get document IDs by hierarchical path
desc_get_notebook_child_docs: Get direct child documents at the notebook root
desc_get_document_child_blocks: Get direct child blocks by document ID
desc_get_document_child_docs: Get direct child documents by document ID
desc_insert_block: Insert a new block at specified position
desc_prepend_block: Insert a block at the beginning of parent
desc_append_block: Insert a block at the end of parent
desc_move_block: Move a block to new position
desc_get_block_kramdown: Get block content in kramdown format
desc_get_child_blocks: Get all child blocks of a parent
desc_upload_asset: Read a local file path and upload it to the assets directory; files larger than the configured threshold must stop and ask the user before retrying with confirmLargeFile=true
desc_render_template: Render a template with document context
notebook_tool_desc: Expose the aggregated notebook tool to MCP clients.
document_tool_desc: Expose the aggregated document tool to MCP clients.
block_tool_desc: Expose the aggregated block tool to MCP clients.
file_tool_desc: Expose the aggregated file tool to MCP clients.
mcpRequiresConfirmation: Requires explicit user confirmation before execution.
mcpDefaultVisible: This action stays visible in the default configuration.
desc_notebook_action_list: List all notebooks in the workspace.
desc_notebook_action_get_permissions: Get MCP access permissions for all notebooks.
desc_notebook_action_set_permission: Set MCP access permission for a notebook (none / r / rw / rwd).
desc_notebook_action_get_child_docs: Get direct child documents at the notebook root.
desc_document_action_create: Create a new document with markdown content at a human-readable target path.
desc_document_action_rename: Rename a document by ID or storage path.
desc_document_action_remove: Remove a document by ID or storage path.
desc_document_action_move: Move multiple documents by ID or storage path.
desc_document_action_get_path: Get a storage path by document ID.
desc_document_action_get_hpath: Get a hierarchical path by ID or storage path.
desc_document_action_get_ids: Get document IDs by hierarchical path.
desc_document_action_get_child_blocks: Get direct child blocks by document ID.
desc_document_action_get_child_docs: Get direct child documents by document ID.
desc_document_action_set_icon: Set the icon for a document or folder.
desc_document_action_set_cover: Set the document cover image, preferably from a direct URL and secondarily from a SiYuan asset path.
desc_document_action_list_tree: List the nested document tree under a notebook path.
desc_document_action_get_doc: Get document content and metadata by document ID.
desc_document_action_create_daily_note: Create or return today's daily note for a notebook.
desc_block_action_insert: Insert a new block at a specified position.
desc_block_action_prepend: Insert a block at the beginning of a parent.
desc_block_action_append: Insert a block at the end of a parent.
desc_block_action_move: Move a block to a new position.
desc_block_action_get_kramdown: Get block content in kramdown format.
desc_block_action_get_children: Get all child blocks of a parent.
desc_file_action_upload_asset: Read a local file path and upload that file to the assets directory. Files larger than the configured threshold must stop and ask the user before retrying with confirmLargeFile=true.
desc_file_setting_uploadLargeFileThresho: Files larger than this threshold must stop and ask the user before retrying with confirmLargeFile=true.
desc_file_action_render_template: Render a template with document context.
desc_file_action_export_resources: Export resources as a ZIP archive.
search_tool_desc: Expose the grouped search tool to MCP clients.
desc_search_action_query_sql: Run read-only SQL queries against SiYuan data.
desc_search_action_get_backlinks: Get backlinks for a block or document.
desc_search_action_get_backmentions: Get backmentions for a block or document.
tag_tool_desc: Expose the grouped tag tool to MCP clients.
system_tool_desc: Expose the grouped system tool to MCP clients.
desc_system_action_workspace_info: Get SiYuan workspace metadata. High risk: exposes the absolute workspace path.
desc_system_action_changelog: Get the current version changelog when available.
desc_system_action_conf: Get masked system configuration via summary-first progressive reading.
desc_system_action_sys_fonts: List available system fonts via summary-first paginated reading.
mascot_tool_desc: Expose the grouped mascot tool to MCP clients.
desc_mascot_action_buy: Buy one item from the mascot shop by item ID.
puppy_showClickHint_desc: Show a hint when clicking the mascot that it is provided by the MCP plugin and can be turned off here.
puppy_testMode_desc: Randomly cycle real MCP actions for animation testing without calling tools.
puppy_showBubble_desc: Show a pixel-style status bubble with automatic offsets and spacing for different tools and error states.
mcpPermDesc: MCP client access level for this notebook
mcpConfigSaved: ✅ MCP Tools configuration saved to file
mcpConfigReset: 🔄 MCP Tools configuration reset to defaults
